zh.lifeSummary: 當Jordan de Worsley於1312年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯頓時，他的父親Henry de Worsley36歲，母親Alice Radcliffe32歲。他於1344年與Margaret在英國藍卡爾沃斯利結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1366年在英國藍卡爾享年54歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Worsley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Worsley in Lancashire or Worsley Farm in Rock (Worcestershire). The Lancashire placename may derive from an Old English personal name Weorcgȳth (genitive Weorcgȳthes) + Old English lēah ‘wood, woodland clearing’. The Worcestershire placename may take its name from a lost stream-name Worf + Old English lēah.

nameMeanings.name: Jordan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a name given to a child of either sex baptized in holy water that was, purportedly at least, brought from the River Jordan, whose Hebrew name, ha-yarden, means ‘flowing down’. It was in this river that Christ was baptized by John the Baptist, and medieval pilgrims to the Holy Land usually tried to bring back a flask of its water with them. The modern given name is either a revival of this, or else a transferred use of the surname that was derived from the medieval given name. It is more popular as a boy's name in Britain and as a girl's name in the United States.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Jordan de Worsley was born in 1312, in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry de Worsley, was 36 and his mother, Alice Radcliffe, was 32. He married Margaret in 1344, in Worsley, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1366, in Lancashire, England, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jordan de Worsley est né en 1312, à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry de Worsley, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Alice Radcliffe, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Margaret en 1344, à Worsley, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1366, à Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jordan de Worsley 1312 in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Worsley 36 und seine Mutter Alice Radcliffe 32. Er hat 1344 in Worsley, Lancashire, England Margaret geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1366 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jordan de Worsley è nato il nel 1312 nel Preston, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Henry de Worsley, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Alice Radcliffe, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Margaret nel 1344, nel Worsley, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1366, nel Lancashire, England, all'età di 54 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Jordan de Worsley(이)가 1312년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 프레스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Worsley(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Radcliffe(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1344년 영국 랭카실르 워슬리에서 Margaret(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1366년 영국 랭카실르에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.
